title: Artemis II Crew Completes Historic Lunar Flyby — First Humans at Moon Since 1972
detail: The Artemis II crew completed a close lunar flyby, marking the first time humans have traveled to the vicinity of the Moon since Apollo 17 in December 1972. The four-person crew — Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Jeremy Hansen — looped around the Moon before beginning the return trajectory to Earth. The mission validates Orion and SLS systems for the eventual crewed lunar landing on Artemis III.

media.caption: Artemis II lunar flyby — first humans near the Moon in over 50 years

title: Restructured Section 232 Steel, Aluminum, and Copper Tariffs Take Effect
detail: The restructured Section 232 tariffs on steel, aluminum, copper, and derivative products — signed April 2 — took effect at 12:01 a.m. ET. The flat 50% tariff on full customs value represents a significant expansion from the prior narrower base. The activation coincides with the one-year anniversary of the original 'Liberation Day' tariff proclamation. Markets reacted with volatility as importers absorbed the new cost structure, and multiple trading partners reiterated warnings of retaliatory duties.

media.source: Wikipedia / Timeline of the 2025%E2%80%932026 United States trade war with Canada
